nodes.label: Single Generation Limitation
nodes.rationale: Large run-to-run changes despite identical prompts and temperature zero mean one generation per task is insufficient for production model selection.

nodes.label: Quality-Gated Pareto Front
nodes.rationale: A functionality threshold of 80 percent removes models that are Pareto-optimal only because of low price and yields a practical three-model front.

nodes.label: Existing ParseError Preservation
nodes.rationale: The parser uses errors.As to find and return the same existing ParseError after parsing the specification.

nodes.label: Partially Parsed Options
nodes.rationale: Parsing returns defaults and previously accepted fields together with the first ParseError.

nodes.label: Bounded Worker Pool
nodes.rationale: A fixed number of workers consume indexed jobs, preserving output positions while bounding concurrency.

nodes.label: Per-Item Goroutines with Result Channels
nodes.rationale: The implementation launches one goroutine per input and collects values and errors through buffered channels.

nodes.label: Bounded Min-Heap Selection
nodes.rationale: The heap root is the least desirable retained word, enabling eviction while keeping only k candidates.

nodes.label: Full Frequency Sort
nodes.rationale: All unique words are materialized and sorted by descending count with lexical tie-breaking.

nodes.label: Maximum-Frequency Flag Ordering
nodes.rationale: The implementation marks words whose frequency equals maxFreq and sorts that flag before lexical order.

nodes.label: Qwen3 VL 30B A3B Parallel Map Response
nodes.norm_label: qwen3 vl 30b a3b parallel map response
